summary: Completed issue 126 apply-mode merge expansion. Added `merge` operation to `issue-to-merge-github` apply mode: detects current branch PR via `gh pr view`, then executes `gh pr merge --squash --auto`. Updated pilot scope guard to allow issue_close, pr_open, and merge. Updated command_boundary to apply-pilot-supports-issue_close-pr_open-and-merge. Updated apply-unsupported-op test to use ci_wait and check for new boundary string. All local validators pass.
policy_result: Compliant. merge operation expansion bounded by evidence gates and explicit apply-mode flags. No secrets, production, billing, auth, database, CI/CD security, or deployment files changed.
risk_result: Medium risk due to live gh pr merge via apply-mode. Bounded by all 7 evidence gates and --auto flag (actual merge still requires CI to pass).
unresolved_risks: GitHub CI and PR merge pending for issue 126 branch.
merge_status: PR pending CI. Branch pushed; auto-merge will be enabled after PR creation.
